summary: Tested Multilink zaap.bio clone features: 1) Markdown editor in Text blocks - PASS (using @uiw/react-md-editor), 2) Link+Image form with all fields (Heading, Description, Link URL, Open link in, Button Text, Image) - PASS, 3) Design tab color pickers (fond page, cartes, texte, boutons, accent) - PASS, 4) Public page markdown rendering - PASS (using react-markdown with remark-gfm), 5) Custom colors applied to public page - PASS
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test text block with markdown and link_image block for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilink zaap.bio clone features fully tested. Markdown editor uses @uiw/react-md-editor in MultilinkPage.jsx. Public page renders markdown using react-markdown with remark-gfm in LinkBioPage.jsx. Design tab has 6 color pickers for full customization. Block types include: Lien simple, Lien+Image, Bouton, Image, Vidéo, YouTube, Carousel, Texte, Titre, Séparateur.

Markdown Editor in Text Blocks.Toolbar: Bold, Italic, Strikethrough, Headings, Link, Quote, Code, Image, Table, Lists
